overall.description: A ship simulation game showing nighttime navigation from the vessel's bridge. The scene features operational navigation displays including a rotating radar and coastal charts, with the ship moving through dark waters until a lightning flash briefly illuminates the ocean surface.

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's controls from the bridge, monitoring navigation displays while moving through open water at night

entered.detail: left display showing coastal map with ship position and waypoints
center circular display with rotating radar sweep showing surrounding targets
right display showing blue depth sounder readings
triangular bow deck of the vessel visible through the bridge windows
metal safety railing on the port side of the bridge wing
metal safety railing on the starboard side of the bridge wing
dark water surface visible ahead of the ship

segments.scene_description: The ship moves steadily through dark waters at night from the bridge perspective. Three navigation monitors display charts, rotating radar, and depth data overhead. The bow of the vessel is visible ahead cutting through the calm ocean, framed by the bridge railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station during storm

events.description: lightning flash illuminates the ocean surface on the left side of the viewport

agents.ego_description: maintaining course through stormy conditions as lightning strikes nearby

entered.detail: brief bright electrical discharge illuminating the horizon and water surface

segments.scene_description: A sudden lightning flash briefly illuminates the left side of the viewport, revealing the ocean surface and horizon in bright white light. The navigation displays continue operating normally as the ship maintains its course through the stormy night conditions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous perspective from a ship's bridge as a steady nighttime voyage is momentarily interrupted by a sudden atmospheric flash. It begins with the vessel cutting through calm, dark waters, framed by bridge railings and the glow of overhead navigation monitors displaying rotating radar and depth charts. As the ship maintains its course through the stormy night, a sudden bolt of lightning strikes, instantly transforming the darkness into a brilliant white light. This flash briefly illuminates the ocean surface and the distant horizon to the left of the viewport before the scene shifts back to the dim, operational glow of the bridge instruments.
